For airports within India, you can enjoy complimentary lounge access up to 4 times per quarter.
Read More
Reward Points
On every spend of ₹200 earn:
- 4 Plus points on domestic spends; 8 Plus points on international spends
Read More
Competitive Forex Mark Up
Enjoy lowest foreign currency mark up of 2% of the total transaction amount along with the applicable GST on all your foreign currency spends.
Read More
Cash Withdrawal
For emergencies and during requirement now enjoy 30% cash withdrawal on your card. Every card is enabled with cash withdrawal facility.
Read More
Fuel Transaction Surcharge
Swipe your Axis Bank Corporate Card at petrol pumps to get 1% refunded for fuel transaction between ₹400 - ₹4000* (maximum cap of ₹400 per month)

How to avail
Visit our experience page, www.extraordinaryweekends.com to place the request.
A confirmation mail is sent to you with the visit details like meeting time, meeting point, etc.
Get greeted at the airport at scheduled time and place.
Terms & Conditions
The primary cardholder can use the services for his/her accompanying guests.
Bookings should be made at least 48 hours before the service time. - valid for domestic and international departures/arrivals.
Valid at 29 airports across India. Click here for complete T&C.
Golf Program
All Executive cardholders can book upto 4 complimentary golf rounds & 1 lesson in a year.
Visit www.extraordinaryweekends.com or call the concierge at 1800 103 4962 to book your experience.
International Lounge Access
You and your accompanying guests can enjoy complimentary access to over 1,100 airport lounges worldwide up to 8 times in a calendar year
Simply present your Axis Bank Executive Corporate Credit Card, Boarding pass and identify yourself as a LoungeKey member at the lounge.
A pre-auth of $35 per person is done to authenticate if the card is live and valid
Access beyond complimentary visits will be charged at $35 per person per visit
Currency conversion rate is applicable as on the date of settlement and shall reflect in your next statement
Eligibility for complimentary visits is applicable upon payment of annual fees.
Click Here for the complete list of participating lounges
Convert purchases to EMI
For airports within India, you can enjoy complimentary lounge access up to 4 times per quarter.
Swipe your Axis Bank Executive Corporate card at the eligible airport lounges to avail your free visits.
Please note that a transaction of ₹25/- will be made on the credit card for authentication, which will be reversed within 24 working hours.
Lounge access beyond the mentioned limit will be chargeable for primary card holders as well as for their accompanying guests.
Click Here for the list of participating lounges
Competitive Forex Mark Up
Enjoy lowest foreign currency mark up of 2% of the total transaction amount along with the applicable GST on all your foreign currency spends. Kindly refer fees and charges page for further information.
Cash Withdrawal
For emergencies and during requirement now enjoy 30% cash withdrawal on your card. Every card is enabled with cash withdrawal facility. Kindly refer fees and charges page for further information.
* Cash advance fee and GST charged on actual withdrawal amount.
Fuel Transaction Surcharge
Swipe your Axis Bank Executive Corporate Credit Card at petrol pumps to get 1% refunded for fuel transaction between ₹400 - ₹4000* (maximum cap of ₹400 per month)
*No reward points are earned on fuel transactions
Concierge Services
Enjoy your travel experience to the fullest by using the 24x7 concierge services to help you manage all your bookings.
Click Here to know the full list of services.
Visit www.extraordinaryweekends.com or call the concierge at 1800 103 4962 to book your experience.
Domestic Lounge Access
For airports within India, you can enjoy complimentary lounge access up to 4 times per quarter.
Swipe your Axis Bank Executive Corporate card at the eligible airport lounges to avail your free visits.
Please note that a transaction of ₹25/- will be made on the credit card for authentication, which will be reversed within 24 working hours.
Lounge access beyond the mentioned limit will be chargeable for primary card holders as well as for their accompanying guests.
Click Here for the list of participating lounges
Reward Points
On every spend of ₹200 earn:
- 4 Plus points on domestic spends; 8 Plus points on international spends
- Redeem plus reward points on exclusive reward redemption catalogue; Click here for details.
Comprehensive Protection
Insurance coverage:
Secure your journeys with the complete range of insurance covers for travel as well as medical emergencies, and enjoy a stress-free travel experience:
Insurance Type Amount
Emergency hospitalisation $5,000

Click here for T&C.
For any information or if you want to apply , you can write it to
corporate.assist@axis.bank.in
Seamless Technology
Contactless Technology
Enabled with contactless payments - facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at all outlets. * Please note that in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your credit card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the card holder has to enter the credit card PIN for security reasons.
Tokenisation
Use mobile wallets like google pay, samsung pay & jio pay, a hassle-free payment facility, at all outlets for secure transactions and prompt notifications. Load your credit card on these platforms and make payments instantly.
Documentation
Documentation for Axis Bank Executive Corporate Credit Card
The executive corporate credit card with corporate liability allows seamless tracking of every transaction, enabling corporates to manage their travel and entertainment expenses easily. Below are the eligibility parameters and applicable charges for this card:
Make sure that you submit the proper documents along with the application for a smooth and hassle free application process. The documents that you will need at the credit appraisal and post credit appraisal stages include:
Stage Required documents
1. For credit appraisal: MOA/AOA
Audited annual reports and profit and loss statements for last two years
Corporate PAN card
2. Post credit appraisal: Post credit appraisal
Board resolution
Corporate application form
3. KYC of individual employees PAN card, photo ID proof and address proof

Rewards that work for you
Purchase Reward Card
Axis Bank's Purchase Reward Card is designed to not only help organizations effectively manage their recurring vendor payments, with a streamlined procure-to-pay process but also monetize these expenses in the form of unmatched rewards program. This product like a purchase card allows organizations to make high and low value payments effortlessly. Better tracking of spends on utilities, office supplies and other payments for such categories. The attractive credit period with an extended payment term of up to 51 days helps in maximizing savings and the rewards program adds up to the tangible monetary benefits.
